tb_1770729522_1.title: Build GET /api/heartbeat/health endpoint
tb_1770729522_1.description: Add FastAPI endpoint GET /api/heartbeat/health that returns JSON: {status: "alive"|"dead", last_tick: ISO timestamp, total_ticks: int, tasks_dispatched: int, uptime_seconds: float}. Read state from heartbeat engine. Add to existing task_routes.py router.

tb_1770729526_2.title: Make eval_agent model configurable via env var
tb_1770729526_2.description: In src/agents/eval_agent.py, replace hardcoded deepseek-coder:6.7b model with os.getenv('VETKA_EVAL_MODEL', 'qwen3-30b-a3b'). This allows switching eval model without code changes. Also add eval_model field to data/templates/model_presets.json.

tb_1770729529_3.title: Build pipeline run history storage and API
tb_1770729529_3.description: After each pipeline completes in agent_pipeline.py, append summary to data/pipeline_history.json: {run_id, task_title, preset, phases_completed: list, total_duration_s, eval_score, status: success|failed, timestamp}. Add GET /api/pipeline/history?limit=20 endpoint in task_routes.py.

tb_1770805979_6.title: Unified Search backend: federated search router (soc/www/file/semantic)

Return unified result format {source, title, snippet, score, url}. API: POST /api/search/unified. File: src/api/handlers/unified_search.py

tb_1770805982_7.title: Unified Search frontend: search window component
tb_1770805982_7.description: Single search input that calls POST /api/search/unified. Display results grouped by source (file/web/semantic). Cmd+K shortcut to open. tb_1770805987_8.title: Jarvis superagent: chat with user memory + default model config
tb_1770805987_8.description: Jarvis = chat agent with: 1) Engram user preferences (communication style, topics). 2) Default working model config from model_presets.json. 3) Context injection (semantic search + pinned files + chat history). 4) Works out of the box with default settings. API: POST /api/jarvis/chat. Uses provider_registry for model routing. File: src/agents/jarvis_agent.py, src/api/handlers/jarvis_routes.py

tb_1770805991_9.title: Folder modes: auto-detect content type + mode switching
tb_1770805991_9.description: Auto-detect folder mode by content: 1) Documents only → knowledge + directed mode. 2) Video/audio + text → media-editor mode. 3) Code files → code/workflow mode. Backend: analyze file extensions in folder, return suggested mode. API: GET /api/folders/{id}/detect-mode. Frontend: mode selector in folder panel. Files: src/api/handlers/folder_routes.py, client/src/components/folders/FolderModeSelector.tsx

tb_1770805995_10.title: Chat message compression: truncate user messages to 500 chars in storage
tb_1770805995_10.description: When saving chat messages, truncate user content to 500 chars (keep full for current session, compress on save). This creates compact message chains linked to files. One chat ID, multiple visual placements. File: src/chat/chat_history_manager.py — modify save_message() to add truncated_content field. Keep original in current session memory.

tb_1770805999_11.title: Chat-file links: show connections on click (message→artifact→file)
tb_1770805999_11.description: When user clicks message/artifact/file, show all semantic connections: which files were mentioned in this message, which messages reference this file, which artifacts came from this chat. Frontend: add click handler showing connection overlay. Backend: query existing Qdrant embeddings for related items. Files: client/src/components/chat/MessageConnections.tsx, src/api/handlers/connection_routes.py

tb_1770806003_12.title: Save/Undo: Vetka state save as callable function + undo history
tb_1770806003_12.description: 1) Save current VETKA state (positions, connections, layout) as a callable function — save_vetka_state(name). 2) Undo history — keep last N states in memory (lightweight — positions only, not file content). 3) Ctrl+Z for undo. 4) Named saves for quick restore. Backend: src/api/handlers/state_routes.py. Frontend: Ctrl+Z handler + save/restore UI. Keep lightweight — dont slow down main operations.
